programs.title: Boys Toys
programs.desc: Up close and personal with some of the finest sports toys on the planet, from electric waterboards to classic custom cars.

programs.title: Blue World
programs.sub_title: Shark Electrosensory Experiment+Oil Platforms in the Gulf of Mexico+Night Diving
programs.desc: Dr. Stephen Kajiura tests how well sharks can detect electrical fields; learning how to use a Mark V commercial diving helmet; exploring how oil platforms in the Gulf of Mexico can become artificial reefs.

programs.title: Private Islands
programs.desc: Off the coast of Australia, Lizard Island is a place of luxury, privacy and pure relaxation.

programs.title: Behind the Gates
programs.desc: An original Hampton's rebuild situated in the heart of Southampton; a Hampton's replica next to the home of Bill Gates; an iconic estate with views of the Seattle skyline.

programs.title: Travel Thru History
programs.desc: Independence hall, the liberty bell, Elfreth's alley, the Philadelphia Museum of Art and America's first penitentiary, Eastern State.

programs.title: Dream Cruises
programs.desc: A look at what are considered to be some of the best cruises in the world.
